name: Ken Burns
abstract: Kenneth Lauren Burns (born July 29, 1953) is an American filmmaker known for his documentary films and television series, many of which chronicle United States history and culture. His work is often produced in association with WETA-TV or the National Endowment for the Humanities and distributed by PBS.

about_quotes.speaker: Sheila Jordan
about_quotes.evidence: The interviewee mentions 'Ken Burns thing' in the context of watching films/documentaries about jazz history, but provides no evidence of a personal relationship, meeting, or collaboration.
about_quotes.doc_title: Sheila Jordan interviewed by Monk Rowe, Middleburgh, New York, May 11, 2002

about_quotes.speaker: Peter Ecklund
about_quotes.evidence: Well I’ve never met Ken Burns, and I’ve played on three of his soundtracks. I hear a lot about him, but I just know the people who do music for him.
about_quotes.doc_title: Peter Ecklund interviewed by Monk Rowe, San Diego, California, February 14, 1998

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Frishberg
about_quotes.evidence: I don’t even think he was mentioned in the Ken Burns thing at all... The Ken Burns thing was heavy on the sociology, light on the musicology.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave Frishberg interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clearwater Beach, Florida, March 16, 2001

about_quotes.speaker: Wycliffe Gordon
about_quotes.evidence: I think it’s great simply for this reason. It’s something positive about our music that’s being done, it’s televised and given to the masses.
about_quotes.doc_title: Wycliffe Gordon interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clearwater Beach, Florida, March 17, 2001

about_quotes.speaker: Johnny Varro
about_quotes.evidence: I was looking at the Ken Burns film the other day and it showed a shot of Condon’s
about_quotes.doc_title: Johnny Varro interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clearwater Beach, Florida, March 16, 2001

about_quotes.speaker: Vincent Pelote
about_quotes.evidence: of course it’s been a while since Ken Burns’ film on jazz came out.
about_quotes.doc_title: Vincent Pelote interviewed by Monk Rowe, Orlando, Florida, February 25, 2017
